channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Orcas filmed smashing giant sunfish into thousands of pieces
item.description: Researchers in the Gulf of California have documented a previously unseen orca behavior, where one orca gripped a giant sunfish and tore it apart.

item.title: NASA will test SpaceX and Blue Origin Moon landers before the next lunar landing
item.description: NASA plans an ambitious orbital rehearsal for future Moon landings, testing SpaceX and Blue Origin landers during the Artemis III mission in 2027.

item.title: Global shift to healthier diets could cut farm emissions by 85%
item.description: A move toward healthier diets worldwide could reduce livestock farming, free up land, and cut land-use change emissions by 85%.

item.title: Scientists find brain switch that assigns bees their jobs
item.description: Researchers discovered brain circuits that determine bee roles. Disabling them caused older workers to act like younger ones.
